name: Tool Card: LSP
summary: Displays Language Server Protocol (LSP) tool results such as diagnostics, hover info, and go-to-definition
goals: Render LSP operation results with language-aware formatting
Display diagnostics, hover info, and references

specDetail.description: A specialized tool card for LSP tool operations. Displays results from various LSP operations including diagnostics, hover information, go-to-definition, find-references, and code completion.

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: LSP operation type (diagnostics, hover, definition, references, completion)

parameters.name: filePath
parameters.description: File path of the LSP query target

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: LSP operation result, structure varies by operation type

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Programming language for the LSP context

constraints: Must render different layouts for different LSP operation types
Must show diagnostic severity with color coding (error=red, warning=yellow, info=blue)
Must display source locations as clickable links when applicable

acceptanceCriteria.given: an LSP diagnostics operation returns errors
acceptanceCriteria.then: diagnostics are displayed with severity indicators, messages, and source locations

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
